title: Post-graduation work permit: Field of study - Eligible CIP codes for science, technology, engineering and mathematics (STEM) - Canada.ca
content:
## Field of study: Eligible CIP codes for science, technology, engineering and mathematics (STEM)
Last updated: July 4, 2025
Check below to find out which Classification of Instructional Programs (CIP) code (opens in a new tab) in the science, technology, engineering and mathematics (STEM) category is eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP).
- Agricultural and extension education services CIP code: 01.0801 Your CIP code is eligible.

## Agricultural and extension education services
Your CIP code is eligible.
